example_prompt: Check my Notch Pay account balance before initiating a transfer.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code to filter by. Defaults to XAF if omitted.

total.description: Total balance including reserved and pending amounts.

pending.description: Amount from payments not yet settled.

environment.description: "live" or "sandbox" depending on the API key used.

gotchas: Use balance.available (not balance.total) to determine whether you have enough funds to initiate a transfer. total includes reserved and pending amounts that are not yet usable.
The response includes an environment field — verify it matches your expected mode ("live" vs "sandbox") to avoid acting on test data in production.
The Authorization header uses your public key with no 'Bearer ' prefix.
This endpoint requires your Notch Pay **private key** in the Authorization header, not the public key used for create_payment. Using a public key returns 406 Not Acceptable.
